channel.title: Home on Pankaj K Mishra
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Pankaj K Mishra

item.title: A Plain Markdown Post
item.description: This sample post is mainly for blogdown users. If you do not use blogdown, you can skip the first section. 1. Markdown or R Markdown This is a post written in plain Markdown (*.md) instead of R Markdown (*.Rmd). The major differences are: You cannot run any R code in a plain Markdown document, whereas in an R Markdown document, you can embed R code chunks (```{r}); A plain Markdown post is rendered through Blackfriday, and an R Markdown document is compiled by rmarkdown and Pandoc.

item.title: Lorem Ipsum
item.description: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua. item.title: Opps!
item.description: The wepage is under construction paper1 paper2 I hope you can enjoy this theme. The source code of this website is on on Github.

item.title: Publications
item.description: Pankaj K Mishra, Adrien Arnulf, Mrinal K Sen, B. Denel, Y. Sun, and Paul Williamson (2020), Probabilistic joint-inversion of marine CSEM and seismic traveltime data using VFSA and generalized fuzzy clustering, SEG Annual Meeting, Technical Program & Expanded Abstracts Xin Liu, Pankaj K Mishra, Mrinal K Sen, and Leevan Ling (2020), Probabilistic joint-inversion of marine CSEM and seismic traveltime data using VFSA and generalized fuzzy clustering, SEG Annual Meeting, Technical Program & Expanded Abstracts
